rule_metadata.name: ft_zip
rule_metadata.author: Jason Batchelor
rule_metadata.desc: File type signature for basic ZIP files.

rules.rule_text:
rule ft_zip
{
	meta:
		author = "Jason Batchelor"
		company = "Emerson"
		lastmod = "20141217"
		desc = "File type signature for basic ZIP files."

	strings:
		$pk = { 50 4B 03 04 }

	condition:
		$pk at 0
}
